'''valushu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:scalebeam|scalebeam]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-l-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:scalebeam|scalebeam]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| valushu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vælishith|vælishith]] || [[word:vælishij|vælishij]] || [[word:vælishish|vælishish]] || [[word:vælishi|vælishi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:valulushuth|valulushuth]] || [[word:valulushuj|valulushuj]] || [[word:valulushush|valulushush]] || [[word:valulushu|valulushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:valushuth|valushuth]] || [[word:valushuj|valushuj]] || [[word:valushush|valushush]] || [[word:valushu|valushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:valufshuth|valufshuth]] || [[word:valufshuj|valufshuj]] || [[word:valufshush|valufshush]] || [[word:valufshuf|valufshuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:valushuthu|valushuthu]] || [[word:valushuju|valushuju]] || [[word:valushushu|valushushu]] || [[word:valushuku|valushuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:valushuth|valushuth]] || [[word:valushuj|valushuj]] || [[word:valushush|valushush]] || [[word:valushu|valushu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:valushuthul|valushuthul]] || [[word:valushujul|valushujul]] || [[word:valushushul|valushushul]] || [[word:valushukul|valushukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:valushuthuthu|valushuthuthu]] || [[word:valushujuju|valushujuju]] || [[word:valushushushu|valushushushu]] || [[word:valushuku|valushuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:valushuthun|valushuthun]] || [[word:valushujun|valushujun]] || [[word:valushushun|valushushun]] || [[word:valushukun|valushukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:valushuthuoro|valushuthuoro]] || [[word:valushujuoro|valushujuoro]] || [[word:valushushuoro|valushushuoro]] || [[word:valushukuoro|valushukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
